meta.title: Alpha Gym — No Crowds. No Noise. Just Work.
meta.description: Sharjah's premier powerlifting and bodybuilding gym. Old-school iron. Modern facility. Quiet, uncrowded, uncompromising.

hero.tagline: No crowds. No noise. Just work.

lines: We sell the room where the work happens —
and the silence to hear yourself in it.

space.title: Built for the work.
space.subtitle: Combo racks. Olympic platforms. Real iron. Open until midnight, every day.

items.name: Powerlifting
items.desc: Combo racks, competition bars, calibrated plates. The best powerlifting room in Sharjah — and our members will tell you so.

items.name: Bodybuilding
items.desc: Hammer, Cybex, full dumbbell racks to 60kg. Mirrors when you need them. Quiet when you don't.

items.name: Boxing & Kickboxing
items.desc: Dedicated martial arts area. Heavy bags, ring time, pad work. Coached classes and open sessions.

items.name: Personal Training
items.desc: Programmed coaching with experienced Emirati and international trainers. Strength, hypertrophy, conditioning.

items.name: Physiotherapy
items.desc: Sports massage, injury treatment, mobility work. In-house specialists keep you moving.

items.name: Ice Bath
items.desc: Cold immersion for recovery and resilience. After the work, the cold.

coaches.title: Known by name.
coaches.subtitle: Not staff. Not employees. The reason members stay.

meals.title: Fuel that matches the work.
meals.subtitle: Monthly meal subscriptions, prepped daily. High protein. Low carb. Real food.
meals.footnote: Prices per month. Delivery available within Sharjah.

quotes.text: The best powerlifting gym in Sharjah. If you are looking for combo racks, this is the spot. Great atmosphere and community.
quotes.name: Steve Lalan

quotes.text: Not crowded. Feel comfortable. Staff anytime ready to help.
quotes.name: Aliya Ahmed

quotes.text: Old-school based gym. Friendly staff. Great services. Quiet vibe. Always upping their game.
quotes.name: Bloomy Loomy

quotes.text: An excellent, quiet, and psychologically comfortable gym. Qualified trainers. Healthy meals. Sports massage. Injury treatment.
quotes.name: Dr. Mohammed Karkeet

membership.title: Become Alpha.
membership.subtitle: Reasonable pricing. Real access. No tiers, no upsells inside — just iron and the room.

cta.title: Ready?
cta.subtitle: Walk in. We'll show you around.

footer.tagline_small: No crowds. No noise. Just work.
